titleStmt.title: SII 11.66: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 66. (B.K. No. 8 of 1929-30). BIDARKUNDI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A STONE STANDING NEAR THE ĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The record belongs to the reign of Jagadēkamalladēva I and bears the date Śaka 954, Aṅgirasa, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. It registers a gift of land and an oil-mill made conjointly by the Mahāsāmanta Nāgavarmarasa, called also ‘Yādava-Nārāyaṇa’, Vāvaṇayya-Nāyaka, the Ūroḍeya of Bīdi[kku]nde, [Kā]varāja and Rēchimayya, to the temple of Śiva and the maṭha constructed by Isaramayya, son of Dēvapayya. Bīdikkunde is identical with the modern Bidarkundi where the inscription is found.
The date of the record corresponds to A.D. 1032, December 24, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti saka 954 ne Āṁgira saṁvatsarada Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrama
nti Andu . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīmaṁ jagadē
kamalladēvara rājya mācandrārkkāvataraṁ saluttumire
svasti samadhigatapañcamāhasabda māhasā
mantaṁ yyadavanārāyaṇaṁ śrī mannāgavarmmara
saruṁ bīdikkundeya Ūroḍeyaṁ vāvaṇayya
nāyakaruṁ kāvarājanuṁ rēcimayyanu mi
ḻdu dēvapayyana maga Isaramayya māḍisi
da sivālayakkaṁ maṭakkaṁ dhārāpūrvvakadiṁ
biṭṭa mattaru pannerḍu gāṇa Ondu tōṁṭṭa Ondu
rājā rakṣitaṁ dharmmaṁ maṅgaḷa mā śrī .
Digital edition of SII 11.66 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
